facts_srcappapiinstructordashboardroutet.content: The `totalCourses` field on the dashboard response distinguishes 'no courses assigned' (0) from 'viewing without courses' — always include a count field alongside array data for frontend conditional r

conventions_srcappfrontendinstructordash.content: Admin oversight UI uses a distinct 'Course Oversight' heading (not the instructor's 'Your Courses' heading) to differentiate the admin supervisory view from the instructor self-view.

facts_srcappapiinstructordashboardroutet.content: The server-side pattern builds an `instructorsByCourse` map from `courses` + `course-instructors` collections, then injects the per-course instructor array into each course object before returning — a

thoughts_srcappfrontendinstructordashboa.content: The InstructorDashboardContent component conditionally renders the admin 'Course Oversight' view only when `isAdmin` is true — without this flag the stub showed empty results (totalCourses: 0) regardl

thoughts_srcserverpayloadcollectionsuser.content: When reorganizing roles (e.g., moving them to a new module), update all backward-compat re-export files too — it's easy to forget them.

thoughts_srcserverpayloadbackendintegrat.content: Backend-integration layers that import roles from shared infra need their import paths updated when roles are reorganized.

facts_codereview_workflow_2948759836058.content: Always confirm the implementation branch is up to date with origin before reviewing, to avoid flagging issues that were already fixed.

conventions_pr_review_workflow_294876390.content: Quality gates (typecheck + lint + unit tests) must all pass before a PR review is marked verified.
